entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The target crop studied, Arachis hypogaea

entities.name: NITROGEN ASSIMILATION
entities.description: The process of taking up and incorporating nitrogen into plant tissues

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The formation of nodules on the roots for nitrogen fixation

entities.name: NITROGEN FIXATION
entities.description: The conversion of atmospheric nitrogen into ammonia

entities.name: ACETYLENE REDUCTION
entities.description: A method used to measure nitrogenase activity, referred to as plant AR or PAR

entities.name: SHOOT NITROGEN ACCUMULATION
entities.description: The buildup of nitrogen in the shoot of the plant

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE GROWTH PHASE
entities.description: The stage of crop growth focused on reproduction

entities.name: VEGETATIVE PHASE
entities.description: The stage of crop growth focused on leaf and stem development

entities.name: POD INITIATION PHASE
entities.description: The stage of crop growth where pods begin to form

entities.name: SINK COMPETITION
entities.description: Competition between different plant organs for nutrients

entities.name: NODULE MASS
entities.description: The total mass of the root nodules

entities.name: SPECIFIC NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: The activity of the nitrogenase enzyme per unit of nodule mass, referred to as SNA

entities.name: VIRGINIA TYPES
entities.description: A specific botanical type of groundnut

entities.name: VALENCIAS
entities.description: A specific botanical type of groundnut

entities.name: N2-FIXING CAPACITY
entities.description: The ability of the plant to fix atmospheric nitrogen

relationships.description: may be a factor affecting values during reproductive phase
shows lower capacity than Virginia types
